title: Korean Watercolor Travel Poster AI
sourceTitle: Korean Watercolor Travel Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Charming Korean watercolor travel poster for SEOUL, with delicate ink sketch urban lifestyle detail. Subject: SEOUL appears as the elegant poster title while tree-lined streets, warm cafés, bookstores, bakeries, bicycles, lush greenery, distant Namsan skyline, traditional hanok roof hints form a peaceful Korean urban lifestyle scene with traditional and modern details blended together. Scene: Minimalist white background with soft pastel watercolor washes, fine architectural linework, cozy streets, cafés, bookstores, bakeries, bicycles, greenery, strolling people, and subtle skyline depth. Composition: Fixed clean travel-poster composition: generous negative space, city title typography reading SEOUL, central watercolor street scene, light architectural ink outlines, and balanced journal-like layout. Signature Elements: SEOUL, tree-lined streets, warm cafés, bookstores, bakeries, bicycles, lush greenery, distant Namsan skyline, traditional hanok roof hints, pastel watercolor wash, fine ink architecture, tree-lined streets, cafés, bookstores, bicycles, people strolling, greenery, skyline hint, and clean Korean travel-journal mood. Style: Delicate watercolor and ink sketch travel poster, Korean aesthetic, urban sketchbook art, hand-drawn architectural rendering, cozy travel journal illustration, and sophisticated minimalist editorial finish. Color Palette: Soft pastel watercolor washes, warm golden-hour light, pale greens, soft building neutrals, paper white, gentle sky tones, and restrained ink outlines. Lighting: Warm golden-hour ambience with soft watercolor glow, gentle city shadows, and calm late-afternoon comfort. Camera: Illustrated street-level travel poster view with readable city elements, elegant skyline hints, and enough negative space around the title. Typography: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
